summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of AccountantOS. Backend: 37/37 pytest tests pass covering Auth, Dashboard, Companies CRUD+overview, Documents+OCR (LLM gpt-4o real extraction working, 98% confidence in UI), Payables/Receivables CRUD + Aging reports, Bank CSV import + match + reconciliation, VAT summary (CHF/Switzerland/8.1|2.6|3.8), Month-End checklist, Excel Center (14 templates listed, 7 downloadable keys tested, valid xlsx), Reports (5 types), Global Search, Audit, Settings, Client Portal + answer question. Frontend: login works, sidebar navigates to all 13 pages without crash, dashboard renders stats+charts (Revenue vs Expenses / Profit-Loss), Payables aging cards + supplier balances render, Documents OCR dialog shows structured extraction with fields, Excel download triggers binary file, Bank page has csv-file-input + import-csv-btn + match-btn testids, Settings page renders all fields, Global search returns results.

minor.issue: Response uses key 'total_companies' whereas spec/review note lists 'companies'. Frontend uses 'total_companies' so functional, but naming diverges from problem statement.

action_items: Optional: rename dashboard key 'total_companies' -> 'companies' if strict spec adherence desired (or update spec). Not blocking; frontend consumes it correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 825 lines — consider splitting by module (auth, companies, documents, ap, ar, bank, vat, reports, excel) for maintainability.
register_crud generic PUT accepts full model_dump() overwrite for updates — partial updates (PATCH) not supported; a client passing incomplete payload would silently blank fields.

CORS_ORIGINS='*' with credentials cookies is set — browsers will reject; currently frontend uses Bearer via same-origin so it works, but if a different origin is used, cookie auth will fail. Explicit origin list recommended.
bcrypt hashing uses default cost — fine. Login/register endpoints have no rate limiting / brute force lockout implemented (playbook mentions after-5-fails lockout — NOT implemented).
Search endpoint response shape is {results:[...]} but generic — frontend already consumes it correctly.
No pagination on list endpoints (limit=1000). Fine for demo scale, will need pagination in prod.
test_credentials: admin@accountantos.ch / Admin123! (works). Registered ephemeral TEST_ users during tests.
seed_data_creation: Seed data (4 companies + docs/AP/AR/tasks/deadlines/questions/bank/month-end) loaded correctly; no additional seeding needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py; run via `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py` (uses -n 2 --dist loadscope from pytest.ini). All /api routes require Bearer JWT — login returns token in body. OCR endpoint calls real LLM (gpt-4o via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) and takes ~5-8s; add wait_for_timeout(6000+) when testing UI. Excel downloads require auth cookie; frontend uses axios withCredentials for blob download and it works. Note dashboard uses 'total_companies' key (not 'companies').
